SEGMENTS.name: SEGMENTS
raw_lines: SEGMENTS        Name                           Load    Length   Top    Selector   Space  Class     Delta

grouped_insights.title: Linear GCBASIC command comparison chain (109 blocks).
grouped_insights.compiler_reason: GCBASIC translated repeated IF char = literal tests into movlw/subwf/btfss/goto blocks.
grouped_insights.fix_strategy: Normalize command input to one case once; remove duplicate upper/lower tests; consider grouped/table dispatch.

grouped_insights.title: GCBASIC structured GOTO/label flow (1217 findings).
grouped_insights.compiler_reason: GCBASIC emits explicit labels and GOTOs for IF/ELSE/ENDIF structure.
grouped_insights.programmer_intent: Represent structured BASIC control flow in PIC assembly.
grouped_insights.fix_strategy: Do not remove generated GOTOs directly; simplify repeated source-level branches.

grouped_insights.title: MOVF_FILE_TO_SELF (6 occurrences).
grouped_insights.compiler_reason: This idiom updates flags, especially Z, without changing the register value.
grouped_insights.fix_strategy: Keep if followed by a STATUS/Z test or skip instruction.

grouped_insights.title: PIC_SKIP_CONTROL_FLOW (177 occurrences).
grouped_insights.compiler_reason: GCBASIC/PIC-AS commonly emits BTFSS/BTFSC-style skip tests for IF/THEN and loop logic.
grouped_insights.programmer_intent: Implement a source-level conditional or loop test.
grouped_insights.fix_strategy: Do not optimize individual skip instructions. Reduce repeated source-level condition patterns.

grouped_insights.title: DELAY_OR_TIMING (6 occurrences).
grouped_insights.compiler_reason: GCBASIC emitted a delay helper or software timing loop.
grouped_insights.programmer_intent: Wait for a human-visible/peripheral timing interval.
grouped_insights.fix_strategy: In this CLI, strings and dispatch are higher-value targets than delay code.
